case_title: CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR VS. DAVID CHRISTOPHER CLIFTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLIFTON, DAVID CHRISTOPHER $2,722.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.92 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,782.92, DEFENDANT DAVID CHRISTOPHER CLIFTON NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CLIFTON, DAVID CHRISTOPHER
